Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Party Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 377.32
Off Calendar Feb-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LL JOHN DOE OJ'S Motion For Order Substituting Party Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 377.32

LL John Doe OJ, plaintiff, died after filing this case. His daughter, Latefia Johnson, seeks to substitute herself as plaintiff in this action as the successor in interest to LL John Doe OJ. The motion is opposed by one of the named defendants, Doe Religious Organization 3 ("Organization 3"). For the reasons stated herein, the court grants the motion.

[SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS]

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
